title: A.D.F.

{{StructuredQuote |text=We may be weak in numbers, but we are the definition of strong technology and knowledge. |speaker=Aran Virellion }}

{{RecommendedAudioNest|bg-color=var(--theme-page-background-color--secondary)|border=2px solid var(--theme-border-color)|text-color=var(--theme-text-color)|audio={{Audio|file=Third Theme - PRESSURE GAME OST -.mp3|loop=true|volume=0.95|align=center|=true|secrettext=Pressure Reference. '''GROUP OF INTEREST'''
PRIMARY GROUP TYPE
'''Containment / Research'''
'''Influence:''' 3/10
'''Hostility:''' 3/10
'''Organization:''' 8/10
{{Underline|442230}}
== Description == {{Simple Image Block|image=A.d.f. logo notext.png|width=280px|style=Border: 6px double var(--theme-border-color);background: var(--theme-page-background-color--secondary)|caption=The official logo of [[Another Dimension Foundation]]}} The [[Another Dimension Foundation]] (A.D.F.) is a powerful and highly organized group operating within the [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]], dedicated to the containment, analysis, and weaponization of anomalous entities and objects. [[Another Dimension Foundation]] has established itself as both a scientific authority and a strategic trade partner in the anomalous ecosystem. With a membership of approximately one thousand individuals, the group is structured with precision. A significant portion of its force is deployed in the field; roughly a third of its members are explorers and containment agents, who are tasked with locating, securing, and documenting threats and curiosities across the levels. An equal share of the organization is composed of scientists, who focus on research, experimentation, and the understanding of non-Euclidean physics and unstable matter. Engineers make up a quarter of the group’s membership, who work tirelessly to design useful and effective weapons, containment units, and transport systems. The last fraction consists of trained guards, who provide both internal security and field support during high-risk missions.
{{Underline|442230}}
== Establishments == === A.D.F Major Facility === {{Simple Image Block|align=left|image=A.D.F. facility rework.png|width=280px|style=Border: 6px double var(--theme-border-color);background: var(--theme-page-background-color--secondary)|caption=A corridor in the '''[[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] Major Facility'''.}} Situated within the geometrically structured caverns of [[Level 8.1]], the '''[[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] Major Facility''' is the central headquarters and the primary research complex of the [[Another Dimension Foundation]]. This facility represents one of the most strategically positioned and technologically advanced installations in the known [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]], which uses the unique environmental properties of its host level for operational superiority and sustainable infrastructure. Despite [[Level 8.1]]’s Class 2 Survivability Index, the relative stability and low hostile presence of the environment, with the popular presence of reactive crystalline material, which make it an ideal location for long-term occupation and high-risk anomaly experimentation. The facility is constructed into and alongside the symmetrical cave network, which preserves much of the native topology and reinforces critical zones with composite alloys and synthetic insulation. Its architecture follows the natural symmetry of the cave walls, which uses the level’s layout to guide infrastructure placement. Much of the facility is powered by the [[Level 8.1|Tiniund Crystals]], which are harvested and refined through engineering processes. These crystals provide a semi-automatic power grid. It is responsive to sound and movement, which is further stabilized via dampening circuits and containment sleeves to prevent accidental discharges. Subtle ambient lighting from unharvested crystal growths is retained in auxiliary areas for navigation and ecological equilibrium, and core zones utilize filtered artificial lighting to reduce hazardous reactivity risk. The strategic location within [[Level 8.1]], paired with its symbiosis with native [[Level 8.1|Tiniund crystal]] formations, renders the '''[[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] Major Facility''' not only a scientific and militarized stronghold but also one of the most technologically adapted installations across known [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]] [[Level List|levels]]. ==== Sectors ==== The complex is divided into several specialized sectors. Each tailored to address specific components of the [[Another Dimension Foundation|Foundation]]’s mission. The entire facility is under constant surveillance via a distributed network of sensory drones and crystal-powered robots, which detect irregular vibrations and anomalous movement. Each sector has emergency lockdown protocols, which include crystal deactivation pulses and total sectoral sealant doors. |-|C.C.S.= ===== 1. Central Command Sector (C.C.S.) ===== At the heart of the facility there exists the '''Central Command Sector''', which is a high-security administrative and tactical hub that oversees all operations within and beyond the facility. This sector houses the [[Another Dimension Foundation]]'s executive boardrooms, surveillance networks, inter-level communication nodes, and strategic planning centers. Access to this area is restricted to high-ranking personnel and requires triple-authentication clearance. Functions include:
• Live monitoring of all facility sectors.
• Coordination of containment and recovery missions.
• Interdimensional diplomatic and trade negotiations.
|-|C.A.H.S.= ===== 2. Containment & Anomaly Holding Sector (C.A.H.S.) ===== The '''Containment and Anomaly Holding Sector''' is the most fortified section of the facility. It features a wide array of adaptive containment chambers, which are each calibrated to accommodate the unique physical and metaphysical properties of the stored [[Entity List|entities]] or [[Object List|artifacts]]. Redundant power systems, cognitive hazard shielding, and environmental modulation units ensure minimal risk of breach. Key areas include:
• Biological Containment Blocks (for organic or sentient anomalies).
• Object Vaults (for inert or semi-active anomalous objects/chemicals).
• Hazard-Class Chambers (for reality-bending or unstable phenomena).
Security in this sector is maintained by drones, armed personnel, and neural failsafe mechanisms. |-|S.R.S.= ===== 3. Scientific Research Sector (S.R.S.) ===== The '''Scientific Research Sector''' contains an expansive suite of laboratories, testing environments, and theoretical simulation chambers. Here, [[Another Dimension Foundation]] scientists conduct rigorous investigations into [[Phenomenon 11|non-Euclidean physics]], [[Object List|anomalous chemistry]], and para-cognitive fields. Research teams are divided by discipline, with intersector collaboration encouraged through rotating think tanks and shared anomaly studies. Subdivisions include:
• Theoretical Anomalous Physics Lab.
• Dimensional Chemistry and Bioanalysis Wing.
• Cognito-hazard and Infohazard Study Units.
• Temporal Mechanics and Loop Analysis Section.
|-|E.D.S.= ===== 4. Engineering & Development Sector (E.D.S.) ===== The '''Engineering and Development Sector''' is responsible for designing and refining the technology that powers the [[Another Dimension Foundation]]'s field operations and facility systems. This includes the creation of custom containment units, inter-level transport rigs, and offensive/defensive gear used by containment and exploration teams. Key facilities within '''E.D.S.''':
• Prototyping Bays and Fabrication Labs.
• Dimensional Transport Vehicle Hangars.
• Weapon and Armor Testing Grounds.
• Power Core Calibration Units.
|-|E.D.W.= ===== 5. Exploration & Deployment Wing (E.D.W.) ===== The '''Exploration and Deployment Wing''' manages all outbound expeditions into the [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]]’ many levels. This sector includes barracks, briefing rooms, launch portals, and equipment lockers. Personnel assigned here are trained in multi-level navigation, survival tactics, and anomaly encounter protocols. Major features:
• Deployment Gates to stabilized exit points.
• Secure Equipment Armories and Storage.
• Cartography and Data Mapping Stations.
• Training Simulators and Hazard Scenario Rooms.
|-|M.R.D.= ===== 6. Medical & Recovery Division (M.R.D.) ===== The '''Medical and Recovery Division''' gives comprehensive physical and psychological care for personnel. Due to the high-risk nature of operations and exposure to cognito-hazards, the '''M.R.D.''' maintains both conventional medical facilities and specialized therapy units for memory anomalies, identity fragmentation, and other [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]]-induced conditions. Sections include:
• Emergency Trauma Units.
• Anomalous Exposure Quarantine Bays.
• Psychological Stabilization Clinics.
• Memory Reconstitution and Reintigration Labs.
|-|L.R.M.S.= ===== 7. Logistics & Resource Management Sector (L.R.M.S.) ===== The '''Logistics and Resource Management Sector''' oversees internal supply chains, which include resource processing, food production, gear distribution, and the transport of recovered anomalous materials. This sector is critical to maintaining facility autonomy and readiness during inter-level emergencies. Components:
• Automated Storage Systems.
• Material Analysis and Processing Lines.
• Ration Labs and Nutritional Engineering.
Inbound/Outbound Cargo Handling Bays.
 === Exploration Supportive Outposts === Afterwards the expansion of its large-scale exploration deployments, the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] faced several operational errors. These errors caused navigational complications, traversing miscalculations, unexpected [[Phenomenon 11|spatial distortions]], communication blackouts, and personnel becoming stranded in dangerous or unmapped areas. Although casualty rates stayed within acceptable numbers, the increasing logistical strain led to the need for a more structured support system beyond the central facility. In response, the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] accomplished a spread network of fortified rest and resupply stations across multiple [[Level List|levels]], strategically positioned near stable traversal routes, trade corridors, or relatively secure zones. These outposts were equipped with emergency medical units, encrypted communication devices, supply boxes, navigational archives, and basic defensive tools to contain exploration continuity. Upon formal classification, they were designated as “Exploration Supportive Outposts,” or simply “E.S.O.”, which now act as the logistical backbone of [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] exploration.
{{Underline|442230}}
== Well-known Creations == === [[Level 8.1|Tiniund]] Core Reactor (TCR-Series) === The '''[[Level 8.1|Tiniund]] Core Reactor''', or initially as '''TCR-Series''', is the main power system developed by; and of; the [[Another Dimension Foundation]]. It is designed to utilize and regulate the electrical properties of refined [[Level 8.1|Tiniund Crystals]]. Instead of using mechanical or combustion-focused generation, the reactor produces energy by the induction of controlled resonance within a stabilized crystal lattice, which converts stored charge into consistent electrical output. Each '''TCR-Series''' contains a hanging crystal core put within a reinforced containment frame, which is supported by conductive regulators and dampening systems to prevent sudden discharge. Automatic controls monitor environmental factors, such as heat and vibration, to maintain stability. Available in multiple sizes, the '''TCR''' powers outposts, advanced equipment, and major installations like the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] Major Facility. Despite its efficiency, it is still classified as a controlled hazardous device due to the instability of its crystal core. === Waypoint Beacons === {{Simple Image Block|align=right|image=A.D.F. Waypoint.png|width=280px|style=Border: 6px double var(--theme-border-color);background: var(--theme-page-background-color--secondary)|caption=A beam of light, created by the '''Waypoint Beacon''', cutting through the fog of [[Level 9]] in the distance.}} The '''Waypoint Beacons''' are navigational devices developed by the [[Another Dimension Foundation]] to support deep exploration and to maintain spatial orientation through unstable terrain. They are mainly deployed near '''Exploration Supportive Outposts''', which act as a visible clue that reveal the outpost's location. Each one emits a vertical beam of light blue light that pierces through fog, dust, and moderate visual distortion, which makes it visible through large distances. The light beats at consistent intervals, with a distinct beeping tone to aid both visual and auditory tracking. '''Waypoint Beacons''' are constructed with strong casings and compact '''TCR-Series''', which allows continuous usage with minimal maintenance. Although, the exact engineering of this object is unknown.
{{Underline|442230}}
== Relations == As an autonomous and well-resourced organization within the [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]], the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] maintains a calculated, and multi-faceted behaviour to interacting with other groups. Although the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] operates independently from any overarching authority, it recognizes the importance of strategic alliances, information exchange, and trade diplomacy in navigating the complexities of the [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]]’ sociopolitical landscape. The [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F]]’s relationships vary across the spectrum. From cooperative alliances and conditional trust to cautious distance, which depends on the operational doctrine, ideological alignment, and risk assessment of each group. The [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] maintains a firm ideological stance against any organization that advocates for the indiscriminate extermination of entities across the [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]]. While the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] does not hesitate to neutralize hostile anomalies when necessary, it views most entities not as obstacles, but as subjects of scientific interest, potential communicators, or even potential allies. |-|M.E.G.= === [[M.E.G.|Major Explorer Group]] === In the earlier years, the [[Another Dimension Foundation]] had a strong and cooperative alliance with the [[M.E.G.|Major Explorer Group]]; they engaged in cooperative expeditions, data sharing, and limited technological transparency. [[M.E.G.]] personnel were given supervised access to limited [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] research archives and had permission to replicate certain non-weaponized technologies for navigational and defensive use. At the time, the partnership was a rare example of strong trust between major [[Groups|Backrooms organizations]]. The relationship began to fracture after several classified archives and prototype blueprints disappeared from [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]]'s Facility storage sectors. Although no concrete evidence confirmed [[M.E.G.]]'s doing, the timing of the losses during collaborative tasks led to suspicion. In response, the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] canceled shared access privileges and tightened security. While they still trade under formal agreements, the former alliance has since grew into cautious diplomacy, with lingering distrust. |-|Backrooms Colonists= === [[Backrooms Colonists]] === Due to the generally friendly nature of the [[Backrooms Colonists]] and their visible distance from the [[M.E.G.]], the [[Another Dimension Foundation]] has adopted a comparatively favorable stance toward them. The [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] has provided the [[Backrooms Colonists]] with limited resources, navigational guidances, and specific trade materials; [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] recognizes their stable settlements and cooperative conduct as beneficial to better stability. Nevertheless, the trust towards them is conditional. The [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] routinely withholds valuable research data, and advanced technological contexts. Proposals for cooperative operations initiated by the [[Backrooms Colonists]] are usually denied or subjected to strict oversight. While diplomatic relations are open and generally respectful, the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] has a cautious boundary, and ensures that cooperation does not compromise its operational security or long-term objectives. |-|A.E.G.= === [[The Anti-Entity Group]] === The [[Another Dimension Foundation]] upholds a belief focused on the controlled containment, study, and, when feasible, preservation of [[Entity List|entities]]. This stance directly conflicts with the ideology of [[The Anti-Entity Group]], which advocates for the systematic extermination of [[Entity List|entities]] across the [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]]. The [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] considers such actions both ethically unjustifiable and strategically dangerous, which argues that eliminating entire [[Entity List|entity]] populations could destabilize the fragile ecological and metaphysical balance that sustains the [[Level List|levels]]. Accordingly, the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] has formally condemned the [[The Anti-Entity Group|A.E.G.]]’s methods and has repeatedly intervened to prevent their operations within zones designated under [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] protection. On multiple recorded occasions, [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] security units have denied [[The Anti-Entity Group|A.E.G.]] access to entity-rich areas, reinforced territorial boundaries, and escorted their personnel out of restricted areas. Although open warfare has been avoided multiple times, relations between the two groups is hostile. |-|Architect Industries= === [[Architect Industries]] === The relationship between the [[Another Dimension Foundation]] and [[Architect Industries]] is largely transactional and narrowly focused on infrastructure support. Their interactions are occasionally trading construction materials, and structural components. Although both [[Groups|groups]] have professional construction knowledge, collaboration is rare and usually limited to logistical negotiations. The [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] values [[Architect Industries]] for its engineering reliability, but pure cooperation are extremely minimal; both groups prefer to operate within their respective boundaries. |-|Republic of Aurielle= === [[Republic of Aurielle]] === Due to the [[Republic of Aurielle]] being a well structured, militarized, and large nation rather than a [[Groups|Backrooms group]], the [[Another Dimension Foundation]] made a policy of deliberate non-aggression toward its territory and forces. To strengthen diplomatic stability, the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] has occasionally provided certain resources and valuable materials without formal trade demands, which makes such gestures as demonstrations of peace and mutual respect. Although none formal alliance exists, both of them have a cautious but peaceful understanding towards eachother. |-|A.A.E.G.= === [[A.A.E.G.|Andrew Austin Explorer Group]] === There are conflicting accounts regarding the relationship between the [[Another Dimension Foundation]] and the [[A.A.E.G.|Andrew Austin Explorer Group]]. Official information is extremely rare, and witness accounts vary significantly in context. Some reports claim the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] encountered the [[A.A.E.G.]] before it even fully formed as an organized group; when it only consisted solely of its two founders, [[A.A.E.G.|Andrew]] and [[A.A.E.G.|Austin]]. According to these claims, the meeting was brief, undocumented in public archives, and possibly classified under early exploratory contact logs. Alternatives propose a different history. Certain theorists believe that the [[A.A.E.G.]] did not exist at the time of the alleged encounter; instead, formed only after [[A.A.E.G.|Andrew]] and [[A.A.E.G.|Austin]] became lost and stranded during a risky exploration mission. In this version, their survival and eventual regrouping led to the formation of [[A.A.E.G.]] Despite theories, no confirmed interactions have surfaced to clarify the matter. As such, the nature of interactions; if any; between the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] and the [[A.A.E.G.]] is still unresolved. Within archival discussions, the subject is usually labeled as “historically indeterminate,” which leaves the truth of their relationship as an unsolved mystery.
{{Underline|442230}}
== Person of Interests == The leadership and field personnel of the [[Another Dimension Foundation]] include some of the most unique, capable, and well-known figures in [[Backrooms Wiki|Backrooms]] society. Below are three such individuals/entities whose reputations are beyond the confines of the facility. === Director-Echelon "Ocuvalis" === The Supreme Overseer of the [[Another Dimension Foundation]], '''Ocuvalis''', is a sentient, and humanoid-like entity intrinsically bound to the facility's infrastructure. '''Ocuvalis''' has the height over 5 meters. And, '''Ocuvalis''' appears as a white, and featureless giant with long limbs and a singular eye on its chest, which constantly surveys its surroundings. Its head lacks facial features except for a massive, and permanently open mouth, from which harmonic resonance; used for communication and command; can be heard. Although non-verbal by traditional means, '''Ocuvalis''' communicates via resonant frequencies that are translated into directives by the facility's AI devices. The [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] Major Facility is biometrically and metaphysically linked to '''Ocuvalis'''. Through this connection, it has the control over all systems within the facility: security protocols, lockdown sequences, environmental regulation, and even remote machinery. Its origin is classified, although some senior personnel theorize it was either born from [[Level 8.1]] itself or is a hyper-entity that chose to govern from within it. '''Ocuvalis''' is revered by members of the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]] not as a god, but as the embodiment of logic, order, and control. === Lieutenant Aran Virellion === '''Aran Virellion''' acts as the Chief of the Facility Security and is popularly regarded as the most elite combatant within the [[Another Dimension Foundation]]. '''Virellion''' is known for his flawless field record, which have led over 200 hostile entity operations without a single fatality among his unit. He is 6'7" tall and encased in modular strong armor laced with refined [[Level 8.1|Tiniund]] filament. He is a physically imposing figure, but his true strength exists in tactical awareness, reflex augmentation, and psychological discipline. '''Virellion'''’s armor, named as ''"Aegis Variant-9,"'' is built to dynamically respond to electrical reaction from nearby [[Level 8.1|Tiniund Crystals]], which allows real-time energy shielding and impact dampening. His weapon of choice is the '''HV-Rail Cleaver''', a fusion weapon that doubles as a high-velocity blade and ranged electromagnetic cannon. '''Aran''' is a guardian and an enforcer; loyal to the directives of '''Ocuvalis''', but known to disobey upper-tier advisors when ethics and survival instincts collide. Despite his stoic behaviour, he is deeply respected by subordinates and rumored to have a personal code that prioritizes the protection of both human and non-human intelligences. === Dr. Celia Myrren === '''Dr. Celia Myrren''' is the [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F.]]’s foremost expert in cognito-hazardous [[Phenomenon List|phenomena]], and is widely known for her pioneering work in memetic encryption, infohazard filtration, and inter-entity linguistics. In the past, she used to be an independent theorist from [[M.E.G.]], but '''Dr. Myrren''' defected to the [[Another Dimension Foundation]] after surviving direct exposure to an anomalous text from an unknown level that altered her perception of language and memory. '''Celia''' exhibits a rare neurological adaptation that allows her to interface with certain memetic anomalies without cognitive breakdown, although she requires mental stabilization treatments every 72 hours. Usually, she is seen wearing a neutral-tone containment smock with a luminescent visor that translates her constantly changing perception into readable data. Her work has led to peaceful contact with several hostile [[Entity List|entities]]. Although reclusive and emotionally distant, '''Dr. Myrren''' is instrumental in [[Another Dimension Foundation|A.D.F]]’s philosophy of understanding over eradication and has written internal policy documents that reject the ideology of groups like [[The Anti-Entity Group]].
